servinfo.title: Rear Coil Spring and Spring Seat Check

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Rear Coil Spring and Spring Seat Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: Check rear coil spring for crack, damage and deformation.
Check spring seat for crack, damage and deformation.

servinfo.ptxt: If check result is not OK, replace rear coil spring and / or spring seat with new one.
